_meta.derivation: earliest commit per author_login from commits.json; enrich via /commits/{sha} for files/stats

data.author: Guillaumebeuzeboc
data.message:
Guillaume/ci rebase (#46)

* fix(CI): allow manual CI trigger
* fix(CI): update & upgrade before rosdep
* fix(CI): remove pip3 libraries
* fix(CI): macos, use updated ros action
* fix(CI): macOS, build ROS 2 from source
* fix(ci): docker image is now fixed
https://github.com/osrf/docker_images/pull/641
* fix(CI): apply suggested changes

data.author: aprotyas
data.message:
Using underscore names in `setup.cfg` (#42)

The previous names are now deprecated, so this commit migrates away from
them.
